TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男女通用名 Agiq lalu mlikuy ru kneril qu Aqiq. hiya ga qutux cipok na k'man. bagan lga mphpah plquy. ana wal suqun mqumah ga, shhuy sbehuy hlhul kayal baq mrkyas mtangu abaw nya lozi. aki yan sqani laqi klokah ini kpyut kinbahan muci bnkis. yasa tlalu yagih "Agiq". Agiq "Agiq".
S.PHON: == == ******** aɣiq lalu mlikuj ru kneril qu aqiq. ħija ɣa qutux ʦ~ʨipok na kʔman. βaɣan lɣa mpħpaħ plquj. ana wal s~ɕuqun mqumaħ ɣa, s~ɕħħuj s~ɕβeħuj ħlħul kajal βaq mrkjas~ɕ mtaŋu aβaw nja lozi. aki jan s~ɕqani laqi klokaħ ini kpjut kinβaħan muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. jas~ɕa tlalu jaɣiħ "aɣiq". aɣiq "aɣiq".
S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男女通用名 Agiq lalu mlikuy ru kneril qu Aqiq. hiya ga qutux cipok na k'man. bagan lga mphpah plquy. ana wal suqun mqumah ga, shhuy sbehuy hlhul kayal baq mrkyas mtangu abaw nya lozi. aki yan sqani laqi klokah ini kpyut kinbahan muci bnkis. yasa tlalu yagih "Agiq". Agiq "Agiq".
S.PHON: == == ******** aɣiq lalu mlikuj ru kneril qu aqiq. ħija ɣa qutux ʦ~ʨipok na kʔman. βaɣan lɣa mpħpaħ plquj. ana wal s~ɕuqun mqumaħ ɣa, s~ɕħħuj s~ɕβeħuj ħlħul kajal βaq mrkjas~ɕ mtaŋu aβaw nja lozi. aki jan s~ɕqani laqi klokaħ ini kpjut kinβaħan muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. jas~ɕa tlalu jaɣiħ "aɣiq". aɣiq "aɣiq".
